description: A remote dice agent that rolls a six-sided die and returns a value from 1 to 6. You can specify roll_type as either 'soft' (favors 1, 2, 3) or 'hard' (favors 4, 5, 6).
name: roll_dice_agent

skills.name: Roll Six-Sided Die
skills.description: You roll six-sided dies. I can take parameter roll_type as either 'soft' (favors 1, 2, 3) or 'hard' (favors 4, 5, 6).
